Privacy Policy

Last updated: July 2026.

Overview

Palmshed operates this site as a static documentation and project index. We collect as little information as necessary to provide the services described here.

Accounts

If you create an account through the sign-in page, we store a username, a salted password hash, and an optional email address. We do not store your password in plaintext. Session tokens are stored server-side and set as HttpOnly cookies.

Captcha

The sign-in page uses hCaptcha to distinguish people from automated requests. hCaptcha processes data according to its own privacy policy. We receive only a verification result, not the content you solve.

Email

If you request a password reset, we send a single email containing a reset link to the address you provided. We do not use your email for marketing.

Logs

Server logs may record request metadata such as IP address and timestamp for security and debugging. These are retained only as long as needed.

Your choices

You may request deletion of your account and associated data by contacting the project. We will remove it within a reasonable timeframe.

Contact

Questions about this policy can be directed to the Palmshed project maintainers via the organization's GitHub repository.

© 2026 Palmshed
